title: Underworld [TESTING!]
description: Experience the journey of an undead king awakening in the seventh circle of hell. This intense action RPG combines philosophical themes with fast-paced combat mechanics inspired by classic demon-fighting games like Devil May Cry and Doom.

features.title: Fast-paced Combat
features.desc: Devil May Cry inspired mechanics with fluid combos

features.title: Spiritual Narrative
features.desc: Deep exploration of classical themes and redemption

features.title: Underworld Setting
features.desc: Navigate through the seven circles of hell

features.title: Character Progression
features.desc: Unlock abilities as you reclaim your power

title: Dark Monkey
description: A side-scrolling action RPG following a monkey spirit who becomes possessed by a powerful devil after saving his forest home. Explore themes of sacrifice, corruption, and redemption through atmospheric storytelling.

features.title: Spirit Possession
features.desc: Transform between monkey and devil forms

features.title: Moral Complexity
features.desc: Explore themes of sacrifice and corruption

title: Space Calamity
description: A multiplayer survival experience inspired by Lethal Company, set on the hostile surface of Mars. Explore abandoned facilities, gather resources, and survive against environmental hazards while working with your team.

features.title: Mars Setting
features.desc: Explore the red planet's dangerous terrain

features.title: Resource Management
features.desc: Scavenge and survive in hostile environments

title: Business Warrior
description: An experimental action RPG set in randomly generated business environments. This academic project explores workplace philosophy through gameplay where violence reduces scores, encouraging alternative problem-solving approaches.

features.title: Innovative Scoring
features.desc: Violence reduces points, peaceful solutions rewarded

features.title: Business Settings
features.desc: Fight through offices, hotels, construction sites

features.title: Philosophical Themes
features.desc: Explore workplace culture and human values
